svg.text: Project wizard -- creates CLAUDE.md with stack context
Command center -- interactive menu for everything
Spec-first planning -- interview then spec doc
Plan before coding -- /plan every multi-step task
Context is milk -- fresh + condensed = best output
Verify, don't trust -- always /verify before done
Subagents = fresh context -- parallel work, no bloat
CLAUDE.md = investment -- your rules compound over time
Boring solutions win -- push back on complexity bias
Operationalize fixes -- every bug becomes a test + rule
MEGA-SKILLS (6 DOMAINS -- LOAD ONE, GET EVERYTHING)
Initialize project -- creates CLAUDE.md with stack context
Spec-first planning -- interview then spec doc
Command center -- interactive menu (skills, settings, help)
Run verification loop before claiming done
Test-driven workflow (write test first, then implement)
Auto-resolve build errors after npm run build fails
Reload last saved session on startup
Show token usage and cost for current session
Blocks rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force push, destructive ops
Auto-runs tsc + lint before git commit
Summary and checklist on session end
Warns at $0.50, kills at $2.00 session spend
Captures errors and corrections to lessons.md
Predicts and warns about rate limit approach
Logs all tool usage for audit trail
Task progress footer on every response
SessionStart: load context, detect package manager
PreToolUse: block dangerous patterns, validate params
Stop: cost tracking, session save, sound notification
Tips: Don't edit CLAUDE.md mid-session (kills cache). /compact before 75%. Subagents for parallel work.
overnight-runner --> checkpoint file --> wrapper script --> notification
Spawn subagent with desired model (don't switch)
THE COMP SYSTEM (4 FILES EVERY PROJECT NEEDS)
What a human needs to know
Separate behavior from orientation from knowledge from direction.
Rule: Never switch models mid-session. Spawn a subagent with the desired model.
